warps.notes: Left door tile back to Route 26 (tile 15,57)
Right door tile back to Route 26 (tile 15,57)

tile_layout.notes: Standard 4x4 block house interior (House1.blk = 16 bytes). Bookshelf on top row. Teacher NPC heals party when spoken to.

npcs.name: Teacher (healer)
npcs.dialogue_summary: Your Pokemon look a little tired. Rest them a while. [Heals party, fades to black, plays heal jingle.] There! Your Pokemon are looking good! Keep at it!
npcs.notes: Full party heal. Uses FadeOutToBlack, ReloadSprites, HealParty, FadeInFromBlack sequence. No cost.

notes: Small 4x4 block interior (8x8 tiles) on the east side of Route 26 at tile (15, 57). A Teacher NPC provides a full free party heal identical in function to a Pokemon Center, including the heal music. Two bookshelf bg_events on the top row use the standard PictureBookshelfScript. The house serves as a rest stop for players making the long trek up Route 26 toward the Pokemon League.
